title: Playground Transfer Deck
concept: A transfer-first WordPress Playground console with a protected live browser on the left and a right inspector that treats browser save, local directory save, GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle operations as one operational deck.
focus: large live browser plus right inspector
distinct browser, local-directory, and temporary identities
flows: Inspect a selected Blueprint, validate its JSON, confirm current-content replacement, run progress, and update the preview, path, database size, Blueprint status, and transfer history
Change runtime settings, show destructive unsaved reset behavior or stored Save & Reload behavior, run reload progress, and update runtime badges and preview state
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or to a local directory with visible file-copy progress and resulting saved identity
Launch from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or ZIP import with route-specific inputs and constraints
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open, rename, delete confirmation, final fallback state, and saved-row mutation
Use Site Manager files, Blueprint tools, database, logs, GitHub export, ZIP download, ZIP import, and database download while the live browser remains visible
featureCoverage: Blueprint gallery categories and search with an honest representative subset of 43 entries
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Delete saved Playground with confirmation and final fallback state
Temporary, saved, and local-directory shell state
WordPress, PHP, language, older versions, network, and multisite settings
Destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, selected file, editor, and result state
Blueprint editor with copy, download, run, validation, warning, progress, and result state
Database driver, path, size, database.sqlite download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
ZIP import and download portability actions
